name: Social Previews
description: Rich previews for social media URLs (Mastodon, Bluesky, Twitter/X, Threads, TikTok, Instagram, Reddit) - works on web, desktop, and mobile clients

settings_schema.header: Configure how social media previews are displayed in your Mattermost instance.

settings.help_text: URLs from these domains will not generate previews. Enter one domain per line, or separate with commas (e.g. example.com). Subdomains are matched automatically — example.com also blocks news.example.com.

Channel IDs where previews should NOT be generated. Enter one channel ID per line, or separate with commas. Channels can also be toggled in-place with /social-previews disable in the channel itself; toggles made via the slash command are stored separately and combined with this list.
